code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant Guest as Guest (Education_ClassroomService)
    participant Writer as Writer (Education_StudentDB)
    participant Editor as Editor (Education_StudentDB)
    participant Admin as Admin (Education_ContentCDN)
    participant CArticle as "Create Article"
    participant EArticle as "Edit Article"
    participant DArticle as "Delete Article"
    participant CComment as "Create Comment"
    participant CReply as "Create Reply"
    participant ManageRoles as "Manage User Roles"


    %% Admin actions
    Admin->>ManageRoles: Can manage user roles
    Admin->>CArticle: Can create article
    Admin->>EArticle: Can edit any article
    Admin->>DArticle: Can delete any article
    Admin->>CComment: Can create comment
    Admin->>CReply: Can create reply


    %% Editor actions
    Editor->>CArticle: Can create article
    Editor->>EArticle: Can edit any article
    Editor->>CComment: Can create comment
    Editor->>CReply: Can create reply


    %% Writer actions
    Writer->>CArticle: Can create article
    Writer->>EArticle: Can edit own article
    Writer->>CComment: Can create comment
    Writer->>CReply: Can create reply

    %% Guest actions
    Guest->>CComment: Can create comment
    Guest->>CReply: Can create reply
repo_description: Backend service for a collaborative multi-author blog platform built with Node.js, Express, MongoDB, and Socket.io, featuring JWT authentication, dynamic role-based permissions, and real-time comments

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育内容管理系统设计一个权限时序图，核心是要区分Guest、Writer、Editor、Admin四种角色。Admin应该能管理用户角色，还能对文章进行完整的增删改查。
明白了。Admin到ManageRoles的权限关系我记下了。那Editor的权限怎么定？是和Admin一样能删除任意文章，还是有所限制？
Editor不能删除文章，只能创建、编辑任意文章，还有发表评论和回复。Writer更弱一些，只能编辑自己的文章。Guest只能评论和回复，不能碰文章本身。
好的，我先把四个参与者和六个操作节点画出来：Guest、Writer、Editor、Admin，还有Create Article、Edit Article、Delete Article、Create Comment、Create Reply、Manage User Roles。
Admin的连线我画好了：能管理角色、创建文章、编辑任意文章、删除任意文章、发表评论、发表回复。Editor这边是创建文章、编辑任意文章、评论和回复，但没有删除。对吗？
对的。Writer那边要注意，EArticle是"编辑自己的文章"，不是任意文章，这个和Editor有本质区别。Guest只有CComment和CReply两条线。
Writer到EArticle我标注为"编辑自己的文章"，其他都按我们确认的连好线了。现在Guest、Writer、Editor、Admin的权限层次很清晰。
稍等，我刚才说错了——Admin的ManageRoles应该是"管理用户角色"，不是"管理角色"这么笼统。还有，每个权限箭头都要明确标"Can..."，比如Admin到CArticle是"Can create article"。
已修正。所有箭头都加上了Can前缀的描述：Admin-ManageRoles是"Can manage user roles"，Writer-EArticle是"Can edit own article"，其他类似。现在时序图完整了。
